title: Jar Opener Kit, 5 in 1 Multi Function Can Opener, 4 in 1 Bottle Opener with Non Slip Rubber Jar Gripper Pad for Arthritis Weak Hands
description:
【Premium Material】The rubber jar gripper pads are made of high-quality silicone materials, soft and durable, not easy to deform, and have a long service life. The rubber material and texture design make it perfectly non-slip.
【Good Helper】The jar gripper pads are flexible and practical. With strong grip, hence increasing friction, they can help those who have weak hands to easily open stubborn bottles.
【Wide Application】In addition to being used as jar grippers to open bottles, cans and sealed containers, rubber bottle openers can also serve as heat Insulation pad coasters, non-slip and heat-insulating.
【Easy to Use】You just need place the silicone jar gripper on the top of bottles and twist bottle caps in the usual way. You will find all containers are easier to be opened.
【Easy to Clean】Just simply hand wash them with warm soapy water.
reviews_5s:
These work really well. They are thin and have a surface texture that prevents it from sliding and it will grip most any size jar lid. They definitely make opening difficult jars easy.These are durable. Great value and function well.There are a lot of jar/ bottle openers out there, but these seem to be the best. I can open up bottles very easily with my arthritic hands. Other ones out there are too thick or not very pliable but these are perfect.I have always had these in the kitchen. Such a handy, cheap kitchen thing for getting a grip on things.
They are a little thin but they do the job, no tears yet.This item works very well, better than some old styles!The pads work great getting a good grip to open jarsYears ago a lady handed me one of these at work and said every one needs to have one of these in the junk drawer. So when you can’t open something yourself- you have a rubber husband lol 😆Best jar openers !Great product!I can finally open jars again! My hands are small and I usually need help opening my jars. Not anymore! These rubber pads have an excellent grip. Glad I got these.
reviews_1s: Very thin, very cheap and not even worth the cost. They will rip very easily.Did not work or help me open jarsThese are so thin that you can't use them to open your jars! DO NOT WASTE YOUR TIME OR MONEY ON THESE!Does not work, not even a little bit. Don’t waste your money.
